title: anotis cervantesii
intro: Anotis cervantesii, also known as Mexican tea or Yerba de la reina, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Anotis cervantesii include relief from digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in the region. Anotis cervantesii can be consumed as a tea, infused in water, or used in herbal preparations such as capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
